name: Ma Financial Group Limited
analysis: MAF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 44% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$6.4100, stop A$5.6133, target A$7.1700 (0.95:1) — then trail it.
